description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 8 hrs 37 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 18 mins per day across 5 projects. His work was mostly in Java and Other, with additional time in Markdown, TypeScript, and JSON. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repos were recorded in the data for this period.
